content:
From 00000813cdb54b74e745d7f91d0f6a462cf0ad75 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: randymcmillan <randy.lee.mcmillan@gmail.com>
Date: Fri, 15 Sep 2023 16:51:27 -0400
Subject: [PATCH] 2097/711890/807868/00/00007d93/1694811084/gnostr.org

---
 patch.demo.sh | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/patch.demo.sh b/patch.demo.sh
index feadce0..c10aff4 100755
--- a/patch.demo.sh
+++ b/patch.demo.sh
@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ for td in .gnostr/ ; do
         for f in $PATCHES; do
 
             git apply --allow-empty  <(cat $f)
-            gnostr-legit . -p 00000 -m "$(pwd | grep -o "[^/]*$")/$(date +%s)" | gnostr-relays
+            gnostr-legit . -p 00000 -m "$(date +%s)/$(pwd | grep -o "[^/]*$")" | gnostr-relays
 
         done
     done
--
libgit2 1.6.4
